calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-05-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:25am
Judge Pro Tem Robert Sheppard, clerk Jean Kong, not reported, D525.
Cause Called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, 3301-3311 Cesar Chavez Street, Llc, appears by Joe Vargo - property manager; respondent, Ana Margarita Hernandez appears in pro per with Court assigned interpreter Nina Safdie. Parties previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Sheppard.

EXHA (1) SEPT LETTER
EXHA (2) PICTURE
JUDGE REVIEW THE PHOTOS IN MS. HERNANDEZ CAMERA AFTER APPELLANT REVIEWED.
DEFT/APPELLANT'S RENTAL AGREEMENT FROM THE SMALL CLAIMS DEPT. HAS SHOWN TO MS. HERNANDEZ AND GIVEN BACK TO MR. VARGO OF 3301-3311 CESAR CHAVEZ STREET, LLC.

10:10am
matter is on recess for the parties to come to agreement with each other in the hallway.
10:17am
the parties come to agreement that 3301-3311 Cesar Caves Street, Llc pays Ms. Hernandez $350.00.

10:20am
Matter is submitted. newly evidence retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-30-2013 Judgment Entered
